ocr_findings.description: Arrow diagram in 問題7-2 (nodes A-F with day labels and dependency arrows) replaced by image placeholder img-1.jpeg. The question text fully describes the diagram setup so answering is possible, but the visual graph is lost.

reviewer_notes: Page 267 contains exam questions 7-1 through 7-4 with answer key line at bottom (問題7-1 イ 問題7-2 ウ 問題7-3 イ 問題7-4 イ). All answer letters captured correctly as katakana. The 出る順！decorative header graphic replaced by placeholder but is non-content. Answer key correctly uses イ/ウ not kanji substitutes.
